    meta:

        description = "Detection for Microsoft May 2026 Patch Tuesday: Many fixes, but no zero-days"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-05-12"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-INGEST" ascii wide nocase

}
